tools.name: fx_rates
tools.description: Get the latest foreign-exchange rates for a base currency (default USD), optionally limited to specific target currencies. Source: European Central Bank reference rates.

tools.name: fx_convert
tools.description: Convert an amount from one currency to another at the latest ECB reference rate. Returns the rate, the converted result, and the rate date.

tools.name: fx_historical
tools.description: Get foreign-exchange rates for a base currency on a specific past date (YYYY-MM-DD). ECB publishes rates on business days; a weekend/holiday date returns the most recent prior business day.

tools.name: fx_timeseries
tools.description: Get a time series of exchange rates for a base currency over a date range (max ~1 year), useful for trend analysis. Provide start and end as YYYY-MM-DD and one or more target currencies.

tools.name: fx_currencies
tools.description: List the currencies supported for exchange-rate lookups, with their full names.
